// DashboardUrl: Base URL of telemetry-dashboard; its /leaderboard proxy is polled. Leave empty to use the offline placeholder board.
// DriverName: Override the leaderboard 'me' match. Empty = use ACC's player name from shared memory.
// G-force axis mapping: accG indices in ACC: 0=lateral, 1=vertical, 2=longitudinal. Flip Invert* if your dot moves the wrong way.
// MonitorOverride: Optional explicit window bounds in DIPs for multi-monitor setups. Remove to use the primary screen.
